First state whether you agree or disagree with the prior conclusions, then write up to two sentences analyzing the retrieved evidence. End with clear statement of your answer choice using \boxed{{letter}}.
I do not agree with the earlier conclusion that inositol has not been studied or shown to be effective for trichotillomania. While the retrieved documents mention inositol primarily in relation to dietary supplements and other medical contexts, none specifically address its effectiveness in treating trichotillomania. Therefore, based on the available evidence, there is insufficient data to confirm any therapeutic benefit of inositol for this condition.
